submitted_payload.name: Ralph Workflow
submitted_payload.tagline: Open-source workflow layer for autonomous coding with reviewable output
submitted_payload.description: Ralph Workflow is a free and open-source composable loop framework and AI orchestrator for ambitious software work. It composes planning, implementation, and verification into a repo-native workflow so longer coding runs end in reviewable, tested output instead of another confident summary.

why_this_action: Primary Codeberg adoption is still flat, so another fresh third-party discovery lane is higher leverage than more internal prep work.
B2B SaaS Market exposes a live public submission form with a Developer Tools category and no login requirement from this runtime.
This target was not already present in outreach-log.md, so it expands distribution instead of duplicating an in-flight lane.
The submission allowed a Codeberg-primary URL, preserving the primary repo destination.
expected_outcome: Qualified developer and SaaS-tool evaluators discover Ralph Workflow through a fresh third-party directory that points to the Codeberg primary repo.
replacement_condition: If there is no live B2B SaaS Market listing or referral evidence by 2026-06-06, treat this as pending only and shift the next fresh-action slot to another untouched developer-facing directory with an executable public submit path.
